description_long: This is a modern, three-seater chaise upholstered in a soft, light gray fabric with a subtle, velvety texture. The backrest is composed of three large, rectangular cushions, providing ample support and comfort, while the seat is wide and flat, designed for lounging. Two accent pillows, one with a delicate leaf pattern and the other in a solid light color, add visual interest and comfort. The chaise features a single armrest on the right side (when facing the front), which is straight and upholstered to match the rest of the piece. The legs are short, slightly tapered, and finished in a metallic or light wood tone, giving the chaise a contemporary look. The overall design is sleek and minimal, suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, parks, or modern public spaces.
description: A modern, light gray upholstered chaise with three back cushions, two accent pillows, a single right-side armrest, and short tapered legs. The design is sleek and minimal, ideal for urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the three large back cushions, two accent pillows, wide seat, and the single right-side armrest.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the back cushions, the armrest on the right, and the arrangement of the accent pillows.
description_view_2: Direct rear view displaying the full width of the backrest and the uniform upholstery on the back.
description_view_3: Angled front view emphasizing the length of the seat, the placement of the cushions, and the single armrest on the left (from this perspective).
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest consists of three large, rectangular, loose cushions that are tall and plush, providing a straight and supportive surface without visible tufting or decorative elements.
attribute_armrest_presence: There is a single armrest on the right side (when facing the front), which is straight, fully upholstered, and matches the overall design.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are short, slightly tapered, and appear to be made of metal or light-finished wood, with a simple, modern design and no decorative elements.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is a solid light gray fabric with a soft, velvety texture and no visible pattern or tufting, except for one accent pillow with a subtle leaf motif.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are three large, loose back cushions and two accent pillows (one patterned, one solid), all placed on top of a single, wide seat cushion. The arrangement is symmetrical and inviting.
